Query
  Pipeline
    Stage where
      Binary or
        Paren
          Binary and
            Binary ==
              Ident level
              String "ERROR"
            Binary ==
              Ident status
              Int 500
        Paren
          Binary and
            Binary ==
              Ident level
              String "WARN"
            Binary ==
              Ident threat_type
              String "sqli"
    Stage stats
      Aggs
        Agg
          Call count
